prose: No frontier-orbitals calculation was run, and no numeric result is available to report. I did not guess a charge or fabricate a result. The requested DFT gas-phase B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier `standard`, multiplicity 2 calculation on `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` still needs an explicit molecular charge before running under the calculation-reporting rules. Engine integrity.trustworthy verdict: not available because no chemkit calculation was executed. Warnings: no chemkit result was produced, so there are no tool warnings to reproduce.
